text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"The draft directly references weekend withdrawals and NBA P&L and is concise without inventing any policies, but it fails to provide the gold-note guidance (ACH doesn’t process on weekends and P&L filtering/not-a-feature) and makes unverifiable promises of follow-up as its stated next steps."}
